decisions.what: Used @/ alias imports for ScrollReveal and GlowCard in Testimonials.tsx and LogoCloud.tsx
decisions.why: Matches the existing pattern used in src/components/sections/Stats.tsx which imports via @/components/ui/ScrollReveal

decisions.what: Used relative imports for new section components in App.tsx
decisions.why: Matches the existing import style in App.tsx where all section components are imported via relative paths
Specification explicitly requires id='about' on the section element

decisions.what: Rendered Star icons by iterating testimonial.rating count
decisions.why: All testimonials have rating: 5, and the spec calls for a 5-star row driven by the rating value
